key.name: enable-vscode
key.description: Show recent folders in the VS Code dock right-click menu

key.name: enable-vscodium
key.description: Show recent folders in the VSCodium dock right-click menu

key.name: enable-cursor
key.description: Show recent folders in the Cursor dock right-click menu

key.name: use-ozone-x11
key.description: Launch code editors with --ozone-platform=x11 (useful when running on Wayland)

key.name: max-recent-folders
key.description: Maximum number of recently opened folders to display in the dock context menu

key.name: enable-files
key.description: Show recent files in the Files (Nautilus) dock right-click menu

key.name: max-recent-files
key.description: Maximum number of recently opened files to display in the Files dock context menu

key.name: enable-text-editor
key.description: Show recent documents in the Text Editor dock right-click menu

key.name: max-recent-docs
key.description: Maximum number of recently opened documents to display in the Text Editor dock context menu

key.name: enable-spotify
key.description: Show now playing info and controls in the Spotify dock right-click menu

key.name: enable-gitkraken
key.description: Show recent repositories in the GitKraken dock right-click menu

key.name: max-recent-repos
key.description: Maximum number of recently opened repositories to display in the GitKraken dock context menu

key.name: enable-obsidian
key.description: Show recent vaults in the Obsidian dock right-click menu

key.name: max-recent-vaults
key.description: Maximum number of recently opened vaults to display in the Obsidian dock context menu

key.name: enable-settings
key.description: Show quick panel shortcuts in the GNOME Settings dock right-click menu
